story.iWant: a rich attachment UI with drag-and-drop upload
story.soThat: I can easily attach, preview, download, and manage files in my conversations with clear visual feedback.

tasks.task: Task 2: Implement File Upload Button (Alternative to Drag-and-Drop)
Task 7: Implement Delete Button with Confirmation (AC: 7)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Drag-and-drop zone highlights when file dragged over
Dropped files validated: size, type checked
Upload progress bar displays for each file with percentage
Attachment list shows: fileName, fileSize, upload status
File preview available for images (inline thumbnail)
Download button downloads file or opens in browser (based on MIME type)
Multiple file upload: max 3 concurrent uploads
UI renders in <100ms for messages with 10 attachments

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: Drag-and-drop zone highlights when file dragged over...
Test: Dropped files validated: size, type checked...
Test: Upload progress bar displays for each file with percentage...
Test: Attachment list shows: fileName, fileSize, upload status...
Test: File preview available for images (inline thumbnail)...
